vibe: Trustworthy, grounded, energetic, and premium. A blend of Mid-Western heritage (32 years) and modern clean-energy tech.

headings.description: Premium, slightly industrial but very approachable. Great for large numbers, punchy headlines, and conveying solid authority.

body.description: Clean, highly legible geometric sans that pairs perfectly with Cabinet Grotesk.

colors.description: Warm earthy base (Warm Sand) representing the rural/Midwest connection, with Deep Forest text (trust, growth, longevity) and Solar Gold (energy, action). Avoids sterile corporate blues entirely.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing (p-12 to p-24) to let the content breathe. Emphasize asymmetry in marketing pages using Bento grids.
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-xl to rounded-2xl for an approachable yet professional feel.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Use 1px borders with border-border/60 to define structure without relying on heavy drop shadows.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Diffuse, soft ambient shadows. Use shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(29,48,37,0.08)].

component_instructions.hero: Full bleed or large container image with max bg-black/40 overlay to preserve image clarity. Large heading (Cabinet Grotesk text-5xl to text-7xl) left-aligned. Add a subtle grain texture overlay. Include trust badges row below the CTA.
component_instructions.animated_counters: Use Framer Motion 'useInView' to count up (1247 homes, $2.4M+, 98%, 32 yrs). Render large Cabinet Grotesk text in Solar Gold within a 4-col bento grid.
component_instructions.lead_form: Multi-step form in a card. Step 1: Basic info. Step 2: Qualification (Homeowner? Roof age? Bill amount). Step 3: Result & TCPA consent. Show a real-time 'Lead Score' or 'Qualification Status'. Use Shadcn Progress component.
component_instructions.savings_calculator: Mobile-first. Use Shadcn Slider for 'Average Monthly Bill'. Real-time calculation showing '25-Year Savings'. Large, highly legible numbers. Muted background surface.
component_instructions.service_area_map: Interactive SVG or map representation of IN/IL counties. Hovering highlights the county. Click links to /service-area/[slug].
component_instructions.admin_dashboard: Cardless, dense layout. Sticky top nav or sidebar. Lead table with Score Badges (Hot: Red/Gold, Warm: Yellow, Cold: Gray). Include 'Sync to HCP' button with loading state.
component_instructions.testimonial_carousel: Use Embla Carousel (Shadcn). Display real initials/locations (A.F. Dana IN, etc.). Add a 5-star Lucide icon array.
component_instructions.before_after_gallery: Masonry layout using CSS columns or React-Photo-Album. Image hover reveals 'Before' / 'After' labels. Click opens a Lightbox.
component_instructions.sticky_mobile_cta: Fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-border flex gap-4 z-50. 'Call Now' (ghost/outline) and 'Get Quote' (primary solid).
component_instructions.county_pages: Dynamic /service-area/[slug]. Feature a local hero image, county-specific incentive copy, and a lead form optimized for local conversion.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increases. Cards have a subtle border color shift on hover.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling on marketing pages. Sections fade-in-up via Framer Motion.

images.description: Golden hour solar panels on a rooftop, perfect for the main homepage hero.
Solar installer working, use for 'About' or 'Services' to show real people working.
Indiana rural landscape, use for the Service Area / Counties section background.
Concrete house with solar panels for case studies or services.

accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a highly visible focus ring: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure Deep Forest text on Warm Sand background meets WCAG AAA standards. Primary buttons (Gold) must have dark text (Deep Forest) for readability.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add role-based data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, form inputs, and interactive widgets (e.g., data-testid='hero-get-quote-button').
